title.ko: 달리 분류되지 않는 입자 또는 이온화 방사선 취급 기술; 조사장치; 감마선 또는 X선 현미경
title.en: HANDLING OF PARTICLES OR IONISING RADIATION NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR; IRRADIATION DEVICES; GAMMA RAY OR X-RAY MICROSCOPES

definition.ko: 이 서브클래스에서 다음의 용어는 지시되는 의미로 사용된다. . “입자”는 분자, 원자 또는 원자 구성 입자를 의미한다.

title.ko: 입자 또는 이온화 방사선을 다루기 위한 장치, 예. 집속 또는 감속하는 것
title.en: Arrangements for handling particles or ionising radiation, e.g. focusing or moderating
using diaphragms, collimators
using variable diaphragms, shutters, choppers

title.ko: 회절, 굴절 또는 반사를 사용하는 것, 예. 모노크로미터(monochrometer) (1/10, 7/00가 우선)
title.en: using diffraction, refraction, or reflection, e.g. monochromators (G21K0001100000, G21K0007000000 take precedence)

title.ko: 전기적 또는 자기적 수단에 의한 빔(beam)편향, 집중 또는 집속(전자관의 전자광학장치 H01J 29/46)
title.en: Deviation, concentration, or focusing of the beam by electric or magnetic means (electron-optical arrangements in electric discharge tubes H01J0029460000)
by electrical means
by magnetic means
Scattering devices; Absorbing devices
Resonant absorbers or driving arrangements therefor, e.g. for Mössbauer-effect devices
using charge exchange devices, e.g. for neutralising or changing the sign of the electrical charges of beams
using polarising devices, e.g. for obtaining a polarised ion beam
for confining charged particles or handling confined charged particles, e.g. ion traps
for confining neutral particles or handling confined neutral particles, e.g. atom traps
Ionising radiation filters, e.g. X-ray filters
Conversion screens for the conversion of the spatial distribution of particles or ionising radiation into visible images, e.g. fluoroscopic screens

title.ko: 조사장치(조사를 용이하게 하기 위한 원자로의 적용 G21C 23/00; 조사를 위한 방전관 H01J 33/00, 7/00)
title.en: Irradiation devices (adaptations of reactors to facilitate irradiation G21C0023000000;discharge tubes for irradiating H01J0033000000, H01J0037000000)
having no beam-forming means
with beam-forming means
Holders for targets or for objects to be irradiated
with provision for relative movement of beam source and object to be irradiated
Gamma ray or X-ray microscopes
